Design.label: Alignment Issue
Design.text: Elements are not properly aligned according to the grid system.

Design.label: Color Mismatch
Design.text: The color used here does not match the brand guidelines.

Design.label: Spacing/Padding
Design.text: Inconsistent spacing or padding between elements.

Design.label: Typography
Design.text: Incorrect font family, size, or weight used.

Layout.label: Overlapping Elements
Layout.text: Content elements are overlapping and affecting readability.

Layout.label: Responsive Issue
Layout.text: The layout breaks or looks incorrect on this screen size.

Layout.label: Missing Section
Layout.text: A required section of the layout is missing here.

Editorial.label: Typographical Error
Editorial.text: There is a spelling or grammatical error here.

Editorial.label: Tone/Voice
Editorial.text: The language used does not match our brand tone.

Editorial.label: Factual Error
Editorial.text: The information presented here is factually incorrect.

Editorial.label: Missing Copy
Editorial.text: Required text or copy is missing from this section.

Brand.label: Brand Assets
Brand.text: Outdated or incorrect brand assets are being used.

Brand.label: Guidelines Violation
Brand.text: This element violates core brand guidelines.

Brand.label: Imagery
Brand.text: The imagery used does not align with our brand style.
